p1.name: Accuracy PIE
p1.purpose: Planning opportunity discovery and deterministic scoring
p1.notes: Not present in this repository. Source location and deployment must be verified in Week 1.

p1.name: UltAi
p1.purpose: Intake, workflow orchestration, lead management, routing and task management
resolvedBlockers: Test runner was absent — resolved via npm install
Competing CI/CD pipelines (pnpm/npm conflict) — deploy-vaultline.yml fixed to npm
ClerkOS schema had no drizzle-kit path — drizzle.clerkos.config.ts added
Admin endpoints unprotected — X-ADMIN-KEY middleware added
Marketing pages not routed in App.tsx — all 10 missing pages now routed
remainingBlockers: 10-state workflow lifecycle not implemented (core-workflow package pending)
p1.notes: ClerkOS engine provides 4-state case lifecycle. Needs extension to 10-state target lifecycle via packages/core-workflow.

p1.name: FineGuard
p1.purpose: Companies House monitoring, alerts, risk scoring and compliance management
p1.successMetric: Companies monitored, alerts delivered, paying customers
resolvedBlockers: FineGuard and ComplianceBundle pages are now routed at /fineguard and /compliance-bundle
Admin endpoints (/api/admin/compliance-bundles, /api/admin/contacts) now protected by X-ADMIN-KEY
remainingBlockers: No alert scheduler — monitored companies are not periodically checked
Stripe keys must be provisioned in production environment
CH API key must be provisioned in production environment
p1.notes: CH API integration is functional on-demand. Stripe checkout and webhook handler are implemented. Critical gap: no scheduled monitoring loop and no email delivery mechanism.

p1.name: VaultLine
p1.purpose: Immutable audit trail and event retention
resolvedBlockers: VaultLine landing page now routed at /vaultline
Azure SQL Server replaced with Azure Database for PostgreSQL in deploy/main.bicep — technology now matches application postgres driver
PostgreSQL connection string now generated and stored in Key Vault as database-url secret
remainingBlockers: Azure resource provisioning status unverified — Bicep not confirmed deployed
ClerkOS schema (server/drizzle/schema.ts) migration path now exists via db:generate:clerkos but initial migration not yet run
failBundle Azure Function implementation not confirmed
p1.notes: Audit event table schema is correct. Durable Functions orchestrator handles bundle pipeline. Azure IaC now provisions PostgreSQL. Key Vault stores database-url secret.

p2.name: UltraCore Monorepo
p2.purpose: Shared workflow, auth, database, billing and audit infrastructure
p2.notes: Currently a single-app monolith branded vaultline-brand-suite. Must be refactored into the target monorepo structure with packages/core-workflow, packages/core-auth, packages/core-db, packages/core-audit.

p3.name: Compliance Bundle (Checkout Flow)
p3.notes: Stripe checkout pages exist. Reusable billing components worth extracting to packages/core-billing. Do not expand.

p3.notes: Lead capture form. Park and monitor. Do not expand.
